## 📚 OpenAlex

本表数据来自 OpenAlex 学术检索，关键词组为 `(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)`，时间窗口 2026-05-08 ~ 2026-05-14。选取与主题相关度较高的条目。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 8 | Embodied AI in the Sky: A Comparative Review of UAV Embodied AI, from Autonomous Remote Sensing to Task Execution | 综述无人机具身智能，涵盖自主遥感与任务执行，关联 UAV+AI+RL 方向 | https://doi.org/10.3390/rs18101509 | UAV,具身智能,遥感,强化学习 | 2026-05-11 | Remote Sensing | 0 |
| 7 | GeoVista: Visually Grounded Active Perception for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing Understanding | 超高分辨率遥感图像的视觉主动感知，理解稀疏微小视觉证据 | https://openalex.org/W7161452300 | VLM,遥感,视觉理解,主动感知 | 2026-05-14 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 6 | Earth Science Foundation Models: From Perception to Reasoning and Discovery | 地球科学基础模型，从感知到推理，融合多模态数据 | https://openalex.org/W7161353823 | 基础模型,地球科学,多模态,LLM | 2026-05-09 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 6 | LASSA Architecture-Based Autonomous Fault-Tolerant Control of Unmanned Underwater Vehicles | LASSA 架构的无人潜航器自主容错控制，关联无人系统 | https://openalex.org/W7161091618 | UUV,自主控制,容错,无人系统 | 2026-05-10 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Large Language Models over Networks: Collaborative Intelligence under Resource Constraints | 网络化 LLM 协同智能，资源约束下的协作 | https://openalex.org/W7161092198 | LLM,分布式,协同,边缘计算 | 2026-05-09 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Intelligent robot systems: a survey from the perspective of visual intelligence | 视觉智能视角的智能机器人系统综述 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s44267-026-00116-2 | 机器人,视觉智能,综述,LLM | 2026-05-09 | Visual Intelligence | 0 |
| 5 | Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Enhances In-Context Learning for LLM-Based Mobile Traffic Prediction | CoT 推理增强 LLM 上下文学习，用于移动流量预测 | https://openalex.org/W7161091961 | LLM,CoT,流量预测,上下文学习 | 2026-05-10 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Learning to Explore: Scaling Agentic Reasoning via Exploration-Aware Policy Optimization | 探索感知策略优化扩展智能体推理 | https://openalex.org/W7161204834 | 强化学习,智能体,探索,策略优化 | 2026-05-09 | arXiv (Cornell University) | 0 |
| 4 | Sustainable Graph Analytics Workload Scheduling with Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning | 边缘云系统中进化强化学习的可持续图分析调度 | https://openalex.org/W7161354277 | 强化学习,图分析,边缘计算,调度 | 2026-05-13 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 4 | Ergodic Trajectory Design by Learned Pushforward Maps | 学习推送映射的遍历轨迹设计，应用于覆盖任务 | https://openalex.org/W7161353777 | 轨迹规划,强化学习,遍历,流匹配 | 2026-05-13 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 4 | A Unified Knowledge Embedded Reinforcement Learning-based Framework for Generalized Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problems | 统一知识嵌入的 RL 框架解决广义 CVRP 问题 | https://openalex.org/W7161451911 | 强化学习,路径规划,知识嵌入,物流 | 2026-05-14 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 4 | Reinforcement Learning for Scalable and Trustworthy Intelligent Systems | 可扩展可信智能系统的强化学习综述 | https://openalex.org/W7161090267 | 强化学习,可信AI,智能系统,综述 | 2026-05-08 | ArXiv.org | 0 |

sections.heading: 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索
